view.title: Validate explicit UC need #2

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 2 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding verification records.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding verification records.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of 'verification records with expiry and confidence', but the evidence provided does not include any records or data that confirm the existence of these verification records. The linked use case indicates a need for credential expiry dates and reverification timestamps, which are also absent from the evidence. Therefore, the validation cannot be completed, leading to a blocked status due to inconclusive evidence.
